articles.title: Confined migration induces non-lethal DNA damage in developing neurons - Nature
articles.description: The migration of neurons in developing cerebral and cerebellar cortices is accompanied by massive DNA double-strand breaks due to mechanostress during passage through narrow interstitial spaces.
